depth_pass: A2 Depth Pass 3 — Narrative-to-Canonical Promotion Audit

promoted_facts.fact: POM deferred revenue balance $149.3M with $87.4M expected in next 12 months, remainder over 5 years
Franchise loans outstanding: $23.8M total ($7.4M short-term, $16.4M long-term), with $3.1M past due 90+ days
Reacquired franchise rights is largest intangible at $172.4M net ($415.7M gross), $11.7M added in FY2025
CLOC $1.5B facility with $0 outstanding; extended to July 2030; debt-to-EBITDA covenant 3.50x/4.50x
Business acquisitions $35.5M in FY2025 — including franchise reacquisitions with 6-year average useful life for reacquired rights
Depreciation and amortization: $116.8M total ($69.1M property, $47.7M intangibles)
TIS deferred revenue $22.6M, all recognized by April 2026
State addenda structured overrides extracted for 11 states with 8 override families
CA interest rate cap at 10% may affect FPI Term Loan rate (disclosed at 10.5%)
